# Mia-Care P4SaMD

## Overview

P4SaMD is an AI-native platform for Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) development, built by Mia Care srl (Milan, Italy).

The platform embeds regulatory compliance directly into software development lifecycles, eliminating the documentation bottleneck that delays medical device manufacturers from bringing products to market.

## What P4SaMD does

- Connects and orchestrates SDLC tools (Git, ALM, eQMS) into IEC 62304-compliant workflows
- Generates and maintains real-time traceability from requirements to code (ARTT)
- Automatically compiles Design History Files, Technical Files, and audit evidence
- Provides in-workflow regulatory guidance via the Whisper smart assistant
- Enforces EU AI Act, GMLP, and PCCP requirements for AI-enabled SaMD
- Remediates legacy software against IEC 62304 and EU MDR standards
- Implements IEC 81001-5-1 cybersecurity requirements by design
- Guides teams through every lifecycle phase via conversational step-by-step workflows

## Regulatory coverage

EU MDR 2017/745, IVDR 2017/746, FDA, ISO 13485, ISO 14971, 21 CFR Part 820, IEC 62304, IEC 82304-1, IEC 62366-1, IEC 81001-5-1, EU AI Act, GMLP, PCCP, GDPR, HIPAA
